title: Functions as Values, Signatures, and Composition · Functional Systems Mission
summary: A cooperative store needs repeatable pricing decisions after a mutation incident. Transform orders, discounts, and validation outcomes without hidden state and prove rerun equivalence. Planned artifact: Deliver Pure Pricing and Audit Pipeline with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish value transformations from identity-changing commands in an execution trace.
Locate I/O, mutation, time, randomness, and exceptions and move them behind explicit boundaries.
Test whether an expression can be replaced by its value without changing program behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

# Extend one pure, lazy, tested pipeline increment per activity.
